description_long: This object is a detailed scale model of a large, historic museum complex, featuring a central domed structure, multiple wings, and a prominent courtyard. The building is characterized by a blend of classical and Islamic architectural elements, including arched colonnades, a central dome, and a tall square tower. The exterior walls are rendered in a light stone color, with intricate window and door placements visible on all sides. The courtyard is surrounded by covered walkways with repeating arches, and the roofline varies in height, with the dome and tower being the tallest features. The model sits on a flat rectangular base, suggesting its placement within an urban block.
description: A detailed scale model of a historic museum complex with a central dome, arched colonnades, and a tall square tower, all rendered in light stone colors.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long facade with arched windows and the central dome, as well as the entrance area and part of the courtyard.
description_view_1: From this angle, the tall square tower and the main entrance to the courtyard are prominent, with the dome and colonnades visible behind.
description_view_2: This side shows the extended length of the building, the repeating arches of the colonnade, and the rear of the courtyard.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the multi-level structure, the main facade with arched windows, and the relationship between the dome, tower, and courtyard.
